decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to base_record_id entity_mta-nyct (MTA New York City Transit). The observation name "New York City Transit" matches the registry record's entity_name "MTA New York City Transit", and the source 2013_03_sbs_125_st_cb11_slides is already listed in entity_mta-nyct's source_ids. No different registry record is a better match; the match is the observation's own base record.

No different registry record is a better match; the match is the observation's own base record.
